leadText: Malie City (Japanese: マリエシティ Malie City) is a coastal city situated on Ula'ula Island of the Alola region. Its architecture is heavily influenced by designs from the Johto region.

sections.title: Places of interest
sections.text: Contents 1 Places of interest 1.1 Malie City proper 1.1.1 Ula'ula Ferry Terminal 1.1.1.1 Artwork 1.1.2 Malie Garden 1.1.3 Malasada shop 1.1.4 Sushi High Roller 1.1.5 Salon 1.1.6 Apparel shop 1.1.6.1 Male fashion items 1.1.6.2 Female fashion items 1.1.7 Malie Community Center 1.1.7.1 Vending machine 1.1.7.2 Male fashion items 1.1.7.3 Female fashion items 1.1.8 Malie Library 1.1.9 Kantonian Gym 1.2 Outer Cape 1.2.1 Recycling Plant 1.2.2 Battle styles Places of interest [ edit | edit source ] Malie City proper [ edit | edit source ] Ula'ula Ferry Terminal [ edit | edit source ] The Ula'ula Ferry Terminal is located on the east side of the city. The player can take the ferry to Heahea City and Aether Paradise as soon as they can visit the Ferry Terminal. After battling Gladion at Aether House , but before battling Lusamine at Aether Paradise, the ferry is undergoing maintenance and cannot be taken. Instead, Gladion stands on the pier and offers to take the player to Aether Paradise in his Team Skull ship. Vending Machine Soda Pop $ 300 Soda Pop $ 300 Soda Pop $ 300 Artwork [ edit | edit source ] Concept art from Sun and Moon Malie Garden [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Malie Garden The entrance to Malie Garden is located west of the Pokémon Center. It contains a large pond and structures inspired by those found in Johto , such as a tower resembling the Bell Tower . Malasada shop [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Malasada The malasada shop is located along the south road of Malie City. The left attendant sells Spicy or Bitter Malasada for $ 200, which is immediately fed to a Pokémon and increases its Affection . The right attendant sells the Bag item Big Malasada for $ 350. Right attendant Big Malasada $ 350 Sushi High Roller [ edit | edit source ] Sushi High Roller is a high-class restaurant located along the south road of Malie City. Here, the player can buy Z- Kaiseki meals for $ 4,000 each. After each meal, the player receives four complimentary Heart Scales . After the player has passed Nanu 's grand trial , once a day, if they order a Ronin Set, Nanu will join the player and pay for both meals himself, as well as giving the player his Heart Scales. In Pokémon Sun and Moon only, a female Sightseer at the table will offer to trade the player her Happiny for a Pancham . Item Location Games Heart Scale ×4 After ordering any Z-Kaiseki meal S M US UM Heart Scale ×8 The first time ordering a Ronin Set, after passing Nanu's grand trial (daily) S M US UM Salon [ edit | edit source ] The salon is situated off the city's west street. The player can have their hair cut or colored here. This is also where Furfrou can be trimmed into its different styles for $ 500. Apparel shop [ edit | edit source ] The apparel shop is located by the west wall of Malie Garden. It sells fashion items , offering tops, bottoms, shoes, bags, hats, and eyewear, as well as socks for female players. Navy Blue, Purple, Gray $ 8,100 Bottom Sporty Shorts Fruit Sea Cucumber Jellyfish, Woolly Crab $ 3,980 Socks Camo Over-the-Knee Socks Green Pink Blue $ 1,400 Shoes Sporty Sneakers Multi Red, Multi Yellow, Multi Orange, Multi Pink, Multi Beige Multi Green, Multi Blue, Multi Navy Blue, Multi Purple, Multi Gray $ 6,550 Bag Sporty Bag White, Black Red, Yellow, Orange, Pink, Beige Green, Blue, Navy Blue, Purple, Gray $ 12,000 Hat Trilby Hat Red, Yellow, Orange, Pink, Beige Green, Blue, Navy Blue, Purple, Gray $ 7,900 Hat Street Cap Order, Thunderbolt, Scaly Long Neck Cruel $ 5,400 Hat Sports Cap Fruit Sea Cucumber Jellyfish, Woolly Crab $ 3,580 Eyewear Mirrored Sunglasses White Yellow, Red Blue, Green $ 15,800 Malie Community Center [ edit | edit source ] The community center is located in the north of the city on the west side of Malie Garden. It contains a large sitting area with a television for visitors, as well as a vending machine . A girl in the sitting area will give the player's lead Pokémon the Best Friends Ribbon if it has maximum Affection . Two rooms down a hallway contain a class on weather effects and a flea market. Vending machine [ edit | edit source ] Fresh Water $ 200 Soda Pop $ 300 Lemonade $ 350 Male fashion items [ edit | edit source ] Type Item Patterns by availability Price S M US UM S US M UM Hat Street Cap Rare Order, Rare Long Neck, Rare Cruel, Rare Thunderbolt, Rare Scaly $ 25,000 Shoes Penny Loafers Rare Order, Rare Long Neck, Rare Cruel, Rare Thunderbolt, Rare Scaly $ 50,000 Female fashion items [ edit | edit source ] Type Item Patterns by availability Price S M US UM S US M UM Hat Street Cap Rare Order, Rare Long Neck, Rare Cruel, Rare Thunderbolt, Rare Scaly $ 25,000 Shoes Espadrilles Rare Order, Rare Long Neck, Rare Cruel, Rare Thunderbolt, Rare Scaly $ 50,000 Malie Library [ edit | edit source ] The Malie Library is a two-story building located in the north off the city's west road where the public can come to read any of the books in the library. The upper floor contains several books on Alola's past, touching on the guardian deities , island kahunas , and Legendary Pokémon . Kantonian Gym [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Kantonian Gym Introduced in Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon , the Kantonian Gym is an unofficial Pokémon Gym designed to give Alolan people the chance to experience what challenging a Pokémon Gym feels like in other regions . Outer Cape [ edit | edit source ] Recycling Plant [ edit | edit source ] The Recycling Plant at the cape processes all of the garbage produced in Alola. Human Janitors gather the garbage which is then consumed by Grimer and Muk . Battle styles [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Battle style (game mechanic) An old man named Gester teaches battle styles here and allows the player to change their battle style to any style they've learned. Battle styles refer to how the player sends out a Pokémon at the beginning of a battle and are purely aesthetic. Battle style How to learn Normal style Default style Elegant style Taught immediately Girlish style Defeat Lana in Brooklet Hill after passing Olivia 's grand trial S M or becoming Champion US UM Reverent style Defeat Kiawe on Royal Avenue S US / Mallow in the Lush Jungle M UM after passing Olivia 's grand trial S M or becoming Champion US UM Smug style Defeat Gladion at the base of Mount Lanakila Left-handed style Defeat Ilima at the Route 1 Trainers' School after passing Hala 's grand trial S M or becoming Champion US UM Passionate style Win 50 battles in a row in the Battle Tree Idol style Achieve Master Rank at the Battle Royal Dome Nihilist style US UM Complete Episode RR
